description: Two railroads need to formalize the process of exchanging traffic at a specific interchange point.

nodes.task_description: Draft an interchange agreement document that specifies the location, liability terms, and data exchange protocols.
Send the draft to the partner railroad for their review and approval.

expected_outcome.value: The document is sent for review.

nodes.task_description: Once both parties agree, configure the system to allow for the electronic exchange of interchange reports (EDI 418) with the partner railroad.

expected_outcome.value: The system is set up for data exchange.

nodes.task_description: Activate the agreement. Now, when cars are exchanged, the system will automatically send and receive electronic interchange records.

expected_outcome.value: The interchange process is now automated and governed by the agreement.
